test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for the stated acceptance criteria; the verifier reran `cd tests/gui && make -s && xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests` (OK (13 tests)) and `cd tests && make -s && timeout 1200 xvfb-run -a ./SSWTests` (OK (159 tests)).
documentation_accuracy_summary: Documentation matches the implemented strategic GUI coverage and headless icon-loading behavior, aside from a runner-registration note about GUI tests living in `tests/gui/GuiTests.cpp` rather than `tests/SSWTests.cpp`.

findings.summary: Repository guidance still says each test is registered in tests/SSWTests.cpp even though the GUI suite is registered in tests/gui/GuiTests.cpp.
findings.details: See also .github/copilot-instructions.md:59, tests/gui/GuiTests.cpp:14-15, and tests/SSWTests.cpp:66-109. This is documentation drift rather than an acceptance-criteria blocker.
